message.description: Description message, usually 'Tourist SOS — manual activation'

blockchain_id_hash.description: Hashed block ID from the blockchainId Hive box

connectivity.description: Network status of the device during dispatch

emergency_contacts.description: List of emergency contacts from profile Hive box

id.description: Assigned unique SOS ID generated by the backend

note: Hi Ajaya, this is the api-contract.json schema matching the mobile client's POST /api/sos payload. Please make sure the backend accepts this schema and returns a 201 response containing the ID.
